title: spermacoce lasiocarpa
intro: Spermacoce lasiocarpa, also known as False Buttonbush or Rough Buttonbush, is a plant species in the Rubiaceae family that is native to tropical Africa. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Spermacoce lasiocarpa include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Spermacoce lasiocarpa can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
